root: ^EEC: Welcome to the Dark Side, Creature.

g-0: ^EEC: The others of this planet would say that this is my domain.
g-1: ^EEC: In a sense, they would be correct.
g-2: ^EEC: This is where my Orbs originated from.
g-3: ^EEC: This is where the planet's life force presides.
g-4: ^EEC: When my Orbs were stolen, it damaged the planet’s core and weakened me greatly.
g-5: ^EEC: Do you understand why I need these Orbs back, Creature?
g-6: ^EEC: When I am back to my full capacity, I will be able to help your own woes.
